eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Wheeler, OR; at 9:25 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 11:25 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Wildfire Alert from Wheeler County Sheriff's Office. Level 3 - GO NOW! - For the Rowe Creek Complex Fire: Evacuate immediately from from the following areas:

West of South Twickenham Rd, NW of Hwy 207, South of the John Day River (Zone WHH-054)
